title: Gravity Infotainment System
tagline: Redefining in-vehicle UX for the next generation of luxury EVs

overview.background: Project Gravity faced a compressed design timeline and a legacy architecture from the Air program that was difficult to scale. Design innovation had stagnated, requiring a fresh strategic direction.
overview.myRole: Led the team from the ground up — from product vision workshop to final delivery. Directed IA, interaction patterns, design system, and cross-functional alignment.
overview.challenge: Transform a fragmented legacy system into a scalable infotainment platform while delivering on time with a lean team.

title: Air Production HMI
tagline: Award-winning digital cockpit for the world's longest-range EV

overview.background: Lucid Air was Lucid's first production vehicle — a landmark moment requiring a digital cockpit experience worthy of the most advanced EV on the market.
overview.myRole: Directed end-to-end design delivery for Instrument Cluster, ADAS, Infotainment, and Driver Controls across the full production cycle.
overview.challenge: Deliver a production-ready, safety-compliant HMI system with a startup-scale team under aggressive timeline pressure.

title: M-Byte 48" Shared Experience Display
role: Global Head / Director of Product Design
tagline: The world's first 48-inch shared experience display in a production vehicle
heroImage: /images/BYTON M-Byte Interior Light Driver Seat View.jpg

overview.background: BYTON's M-Byte introduced a revolutionary 48-inch Shared Experience Display — an unprecedented digital canvas requiring entirely new IA patterns and interaction paradigms.
overview.myRole: Built the foundational Information Architecture from ground zero. Established and scaled a 40+ member global team across Silicon Valley, Nanjing, and Beijing.
overview.challenge: Design a cohesive UX for a form factor that had never existed before, while integrating Baidu, Ximalaya and other third-party ecosystems as native experiences.

images: /images/BYTON M-Byte Interior Light Driver Seat View.jpg

title: AT&T Navigator & General Motors Info3 Connected Navigation
tagline: 15 years pioneering connected navigation from mobile to in-car

overview.background: Telenav grew from a startup into the dominant connected navigation provider for major US automakers. As Founding Designer, I helped architect this journey from v1.0 to 20M+ users.
overview.myRole: Joined as Founding Designer. Led HMI/Navigation design for Ford Sync 3, Cadillac, and GM. Built and led the China UX organization across 3 locations.
overview.challenge: Navigate the transition from dedicated PND devices to smartphones to in-car systems while maintaining design quality and market leadership across a massive user base.

title: LinkSteps — Senior Health Monitoring App
tagline: Connecting seniors with families through real-time health data

overview.background: LinkSteps addresses the challenge of keeping aging parents connected with their families through meaningful, non-intrusive health monitoring focused on sensory protection and care coordination.
overview.myRole: Solo founder — architected and developed the full React Native application using AI-driven toolchains (Claude Code) as lead developer and designer.
overview.challenge: Design an app simple enough for seniors to use independently while providing rich enough data for family members to act on — without creating anxiety.

title: Mid-Size Platform Concept Design
tagline: Defining the next-generation digital experience for future Lucid vehicles

overview.background: The Mid-Size (Earth) Platform represents Lucid's strategic expansion into a new vehicle segment. Unlike Gravity, this platform introduced fundamentally different hardware constraints — requiring a ground-up rethink of the digital experience paradigm rather than an evolution of existing systems.
overview.myRole: Partnered closely with the Advanced Design team to explore and integrate emerging technologies into the interaction model from the earliest concept stage. Collaborated extensively with User Research to conduct large-scale formative studies — grounding every design decision in ergonomic data and real user behavior. Because the hardware ecosystem differs significantly from Gravity, I led the definition of a new next-generation entertainment and interaction paradigm purpose-built for this platform's unique form factor and use cases.
overview.challenge: Led the team to leverage AI in building high-fidelity prototypes at unprecedented speed — directly addressing pain points surfaced during user experience testing and enabling faster, more informed design iteration. Championed and drove the integration of AI Voice Assistance as a core interaction paradigm, successfully landing it as a foundational feature of the Mid-Size Concept and redefining how drivers and passengers engage with the vehicle.
